controls.control_objective: To ensure 08, 2024 (updated as on february 21, 2025) to all eligible market participants madam/sir master direction - reserve bank of india (margining for non-
controls.control_description:
भारतीय įरज़वर् बैंक RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
RBI/FMRD/2024-25/117
FMRD.DIRD.01/14.01.023/2024-25 May 08, 2024 (Updated as on February 21, 2025)

To
All eligible market participants
Madam/Sir
Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Margining for Non-Centrally Cleared
OTC Derivatives) Directions, 2024
Please refer to Paragraph 10 of the Statement on Developmental and Regulatory
Policies announced as a part of the Bi-monthly Monetary Policy Statement for 2019-
20 dated February 06, 2020, on issuance of the Directions regarding exchange of
variation margin (VM) and initial margin (IM) for non-centrally cleared derivatives
(NCCDs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 08, 2024 (updated as on february 21, 2025) to all eligible market participants madam/sir master direction - reserve bank of india (margining for non-

controls.control_objective: To ensure 08, 2024 master direction - reserve bank of india (margining for non-centrally cleared otc derivatives) directions, 2024 (updated as on february 21, 2
controls.control_description:
FMRD.DIRD.02/14.01.023/2024-25 dated May 08, 2024
Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Margining for Non-Centrally Cleared
OTC Derivatives) Directions, 2024
(Updated as on February 21, 2025)
The Reserve Bank of India (hereinafter called the Reserve Bank) hereby issues the
following Directions, in exercise of the powers conferred under section 45W of the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 (02 of 1934) read with section 45U of the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934 (02 of 1934) and the Foreign Exchange Management Act,
1999 (42 of 1999) and in supersession of Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Variation Margin) Directions, 2022 dated June 01, 2022.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 08, 2024 master direction - reserve bank of india (margining for non-centrally cleared otc derivatives) directions, 2024 (updated as on february 21, 2

derivative contract during the time it takes to close out and/or replace the
position in the event of a counterparty default.

controls.control_objective: To ensure an approach to the exchange of variation margin wherein the exchanged margin is deemed to settle the current mark-to-market exposure between the parti
controls.control_description:
(m) Settle to market means an approach to the exchange of Variation Margin
wherein the exchanged margin is deemed to settle the current mark-to-market
exposure between the parties to a derivative contract, with no right to reclaim
and no obligation to return the Variation Margin.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as domestic covered entities for exchange of variation margin (hereafter known as domestic covered entities - vm) under these directions
controls.control_description:
4.1 Covered Entities for exchange of Variation Margin
(1) The following entities shall be classified as Domestic Covered Entities for
exchange of Variation Margin (hereafter known as Domestic Covered Entities -
VM) under these Directions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as domestic covered entities for exchange of variation margin (hereafter known as domestic covered entities - vm) under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as foreign covered entities for exchange of variation margin (hereafter known as foreign covered entities - vm) under these directions:
controls.control_description:
(2) The following entities shall be classified as Foreign Covered Entities for exchange
of Variation Margin (hereafter known as Foreign Covered Entities - VM) under
these Directions:
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as foreign covered entities for exchange of variation margin (hereafter known as foreign covered entities - vm) under these directions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as domestic covered entities for exchange of initial margin (hereafter known as domestic covered entities - im) under these directions
controls.control_description:
4.2 Covered Entities for exchange of Initial Margin
(1) Entities regulated by a financial sector regulator (including branches of foreign
banks operating in India) and having an Average Aggregate Notional Amount (AANA)
of outstanding NCCDs of ₹60,000 crore and above, on a consolidated group wide
basis, shall be classified as Domestic Covered Entities for exchange of Initial Margin
(hereafter known as Domestic Covered Entities - IM) under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as domestic covered entities for exchange of initial margin (hereafter known as domestic covered entities - im) under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as foreign covered entities for exchange of initial margin (hereafter known as foreign covered entities - im) under these directions
controls.control_description:
(2) Non-resident financial entities having an AANA of outstanding NCCDs of USD 8
billion and above, on a consolidated group wide basis, shall be classified as Foreign
Covered Entities for exchange of Initial Margin (hereafter known as Foreign Covered
Entities - IM) under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as foreign covered entities for exchange of initial margin (hereafter known as foreign covered entities - im) under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as the simple average of the total notional amount of outstanding nccds as at the end of march, april and may of a year
controls.control_description:
4.3 Average Aggregate Notional Amount of outstanding NCCDs
(1) AANA of outstanding NCCDs shall be calculated as the simple average of the total
notional amount of outstanding NCCDs as at the end of March, April and May of
a year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated as the simple average of the total notional amount of outstanding nccds as at the end of march, april and may of a year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for recognition of domestic covered entities and foreign covered entities for a one-year period from september 1 of that year to august 31 of
controls.control_description:
AANA for a year shall be used for recognition of Domestic Covered Entities
and Foreign Covered Entities for a one-year period from September 1 of that year
to August 31 of the next year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for recognition of domestic covered entities and foreign covered entities for a one-year period from september 1 of that year to august 31 of

controls.control_objective: To ensure include all nccd contracts of the consolidated group, including those outside the scope of these directions, but exclude intra-group transactions
controls.control_description:
(2) AANA calculation shall include all NCCD contracts of the consolidated group,
including those outside the scope of these Directions, but exclude intra-group
transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include all nccd contracts of the consolidated group, including those outside the scope of these directions, but exclude intra-group transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure exchange variation margin with a counterparty to an nccd transaction if the counterparty is a domestic covered entity - vm or a foreign covered entity
controls.control_description:
4.4 Directions for Covered Entities
(1) A Domestic Covered Entity - VM shall exchange Variation Margin with a
counterparty to an NCCD transaction if the counterparty is a Domestic Covered
Entity - VM or a Foreign Covered Entity - VM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exchange variation margin with a counterparty to an nccd transaction if the counterparty is a domestic covered entity - vm or a foreign covered entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure exchange initial margin with a counterparty to an nccd transaction if the counterparty is a domestic covered entity - im or a foreign covered entity -
controls.control_description:
<image>

to an NCCD transaction if the counterparty is a Domestic Covered Entity - IM or
a Foreign Covered Entity - IM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exchange initial margin with a counterparty to an nccd transaction if the counterparty is a domestic covered entity - im or a foreign covered entity -

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place appropriate processes for ascertaining whether a counterparty to an nccd transaction is a covered entity for exchange of variation margin
controls.control_description:
(3) Covered Entities shall put in place appropriate processes for ascertaining whether
a counterparty to an NCCD transaction is a Covered Entity for exchange of
Variation Margin or Initial Margin.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place appropriate processes for ascertaining whether a counterparty to an nccd transaction is a covered entity for exchange of variation margin

controls.control_description:

alia, rely on a declaration from the counterparties.

controls.control_description:
All other
payments or cash flows that occur during the life of the swap shall be subject
to Initial Margin requirements.

and procedures to manage the risks associated with such transactions.2

in which one of the counterparties is any of the following entities:

controls.control_description:
(6) The provisions of these Directions shall not be applicable to an NCCD transaction
between entities belonging to the same consolidated group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to an nccd transaction between entities belonging to the same consolidated group

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to exchange initial margin and variation margin with other covered entities, as applicable, in terms of these directions, only for nccd tr
controls.control_description:
(7) An entity, on being classified as a Covered Entity, shall be required to exchange
initial margin and variation margin with other covered entities, as applicable, in
terms of these Directions, only for NCCD transactions undertaken after
recognition of the entity as a covered entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to exchange initial margin and variation margin with other covered entities, as applicable, in terms of these directions, only for nccd tr

controls.control_objective: To ensure choose, not to exchange margin for its nccd transactions, including outstanding nccd transactions, from the date on which it ceases to be recognised a
controls.control_description:
(8) A Covered Entity, on ceasing to be classified as a Covered Entity, may choose,
not to exchange margin for its NCCD transactions, including outstanding NCCD
transactions, from the date on which it ceases to be recognised as a Covered
Entity, in terms of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to choose, not to exchange margin for its nccd transactions, including outstanding nccd transactions, from the date on which it ceases to be recognised a

controls.control_objective: To ensure fully collateralise to market or settle to market, the mark-to- market exposure of an nccd contract
controls.control_description:
5.1 Variation Margin
(1) Variation Margin shall fully collateralise to market or settle to market, the mark-to-
market exposure of an NCCD contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fully collateralise to market or settle to market, the mark-to- market exposure of an nccd contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for the purpose of calculation of variation margin
controls.control_description:
In the event that the exposures cannot be
marked-to-market, a pre-agreed alternative process or fallback mechanism, as set
out in the credit support annex, shall be used for the purpose of calculation of
Variation Margin.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for the purpose of calculation of variation margin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated on a daily basis
controls.control_description: (2) Variation Margin shall be calculated on a daily basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated on a daily basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated on an aggregate net basis, across all nccd contracts that are executed under a single, legally enforceable netting agreement
controls.control_description:
(3) Variation Margin shall be calculated on an aggregate net basis, across all NCCD
contracts that are executed under a single, legally enforceable netting agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated on an aggregate net basis, across all nccd contracts that are executed under a single, legally enforceable netting agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated at the outset of a transaction and thereafter on a regular and consistent basis upon changes in the potential future exposure, including, but not limited to
controls.control_description:
5.2 Initial Margin
(1) Initial margin shall be calculated at the outset of a transaction and thereafter on a
regular and consistent basis upon changes in the potential future exposure, including,
but not limited to, when trades are added to or subtracted from the portfolio, on
occurrence of a significant market disruption, and when the Initial Margin model (if
applicable) is recalibrated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated at the outset of a transaction and thereafter on a regular and consistent basis upon changes in the potential future exposure, including, but not limited to

Provided that the initial margin shall be recalculated within a period not exceeding 10
working days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recalculated within a period not exceeding 10 working days

approach for calculating Initial Margin for all transactions within the same asset
class i.e.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as being part of a single asset class for the purpose of these directions
controls.control_description:
Foreign exchange and
interest rate derivatives contracts shall be considered as being part of a single
asset class for the purpose of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as being part of a single asset class for the purpose of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made on a consistent basis and the reasons for selecting the particular approach as well as reasons for change in approach
controls.control_description:
For each asset class, the selection
of a particular approach shall be made on a consistent basis and the reasons for
selecting the particular approach as well as reasons for change in approach,
where applicable, shall be documented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made on a consistent basis and the reasons for selecting the particular approach as well as reasons for change in approach

controls.control_objective: To ensure direct a covered entity to calculate initial margin using the standardised approach
controls.control_description:
(4) The Reserve Bank may direct a Covered Entity to calculate Initial Margin using
the standardised approach, if the Reserve Bank is satisfied that it is necessary or
expedient to do so.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to direct a covered entity to calculate initial margin using the standardised approach

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exchanged on an aggregate net basis, across all nccd contracts that are executed under a single, legally enforceable netting agreement
controls.control_description:
Exchange of margin
(1) Variation Margin shall be exchanged on an aggregate net basis, across all NCCD
contracts that are executed under a single, legally enforceable netting agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exchanged on an aggregate net basis, across all nccd contracts that are executed under a single, legally enforceable netting agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exchanged on a gross basis without any netting of initial margin amounts owed by the two counterparties, across all nccd contracts that are execute

Margin amounts owed by the two counterparties, across all NCCD contracts that
are executed under a single, legally enforceable netting agreement.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied for the exchange of initial margin
controls.control_description:
(3) A threshold amount, not exceeding ₹450 crore4, may be applied for the exchange
of Initial Margin.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied for the exchange of initial margin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied at the level of the consolidated group based on all nccd contracts outstanding between the two consolidated groups
controls.control_description:
This threshold shall be applied at the level of the consolidated
group based on all NCCD contracts outstanding between the two consolidated
groups.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied at the level of the consolidated group based on all nccd contracts outstanding between the two consolidated groups

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exchanged between the two consolidated groups if the total initial margin amount exceeds the threshold
controls.control_description:
The difference between the total calculated Initial Margin amount and the
Initial Margin threshold shall be exchanged between the two consolidated groups
if the total Initial Margin amount exceeds the threshold.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be exchanged between the two consolidated groups if the total initial margin amount exceeds the threshold

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied for the exchange of variation margin and initial margin combined
controls.control_description:
<image>
(4) A minimum transfer amount (MTA), not exceeding ₹4.5 crore, may be applied for
the exchange of Variation Margin and Initial Margin combined.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied for the exchange of variation margin and initial margin combined

controls.control_objective: To ensure mutually agree to set separate mtas for variation margin and initial margin
controls.control_description:
The covered
entities may mutually agree to set separate MTAs for Variation Margin and Initial
Margin, subject to the condition that when combined, the MTAs do not exceed
₹4.5 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mutually agree to set separate mtas for variation margin and initial margin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exchanged if the margin amount exceeds the mta
controls.control_description:
The entire margin amount shall be exchanged if the margin amount
exceeds the MTA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exchanged if the margin amount exceeds the mta

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called and exchanged at the earliest time possible after the transaction date ("t") or margin recalculation date ("r"), but no later than three loc
controls.control_description:
(5) Variation Margin and Initial Margin shall be called and exchanged at the earliest
time possible after the transaction date ("T") or margin recalculation date ("R"), but
no later than three local business days from the transaction date ("T+3") or margin
recalculation date ("R+3").
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called and exchanged at the earliest time possible after the transaction date ("t") or margin recalculation date ("r"), but no later than three loc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be posted/collected either in india or in an overseas jurisdiction
controls.control_description:
(6) Variation Margin and Initial Margin for an NCCD transaction between a Domestic
Covered Entity and a Foreign Covered Entity may be posted/collected either in
India or in an overseas jurisdiction, subject to the provisions of the A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be posted/collected either in india or in an overseas jurisdiction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the provisions of master direction - reserve bank of india (interest rate on deposits) directions, 2016, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
Treatment of Variation Margin under collateralise to market approach

provisions of Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Interest Rate on Deposits)
Directions, 2016, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the provisions of master direction - reserve bank of india (interest rate on deposits) directions, 2016, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the provisions under paragraph 5 of part c of the master direction - risk management and inter-bank dealings, 2016, as amended from time
controls.control_description:
(2) Cash collateral received as Variation Margin by Authorised Dealers shall not be
subject to the provisions under Paragraph 5 of Part C of the Master Direction -
Risk Management and Inter-Bank Dealings, 2016, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the provisions under paragraph 5 of part c of the master direction - risk management and inter-bank dealings, 2016, as amended from time

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay interest on cash collateral received as variation margin, in terms of the credit support annex
controls.control_description:
(3) Counterparties may pay interest on cash collateral received as Variation Margin,
in terms of the credit support annex.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay interest on cash collateral received as variation margin, in terms of the credit support annex

controls.control_objective: To ensure be re- hypothecated, re-pledged or re-used, in terms of the credit support annex
controls.control_description:
(4) Cash and non-cash collateral received as Variation Margin may be re-
hypothecated, re-pledged or re-used, in terms of the credit support annex.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be re- hypothecated, re-pledged or re-used, in terms of the credit support annex

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained in a manner such that:
controls.control_description:
Treatment of Initial Margin
(1) Initial Margin collected from counterparties shall be maintained in a manner such
that:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained in a manner such that:

controls.control_objective: To ensure deal with the initial margin collected as belonging to that counterparty who posted it
controls.control_description:
(2) The Covered Entity shall deal with the Initial Margin collected as belonging to that
counterparty who posted it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deal with the initial margin collected as belonging to that counterparty who posted it

controls.control_objective: To ensure be segregated from the proprietary assets of the collecting party by either placing the initial margin with a collateral service provider
controls.control_description:
(3) Initial Margin collected shall be segregated from the proprietary assets of the
collecting party by either placing the Initial Margin with a collateral service
provider, subject to conditions specified in Paragraph 9(2) and 9(4) of these
Directions or through other legally effective arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be segregated from the proprietary assets of the collecting party by either placing the initial margin with a collateral service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure also provide the posting party with the option to segregate the initial margin that it posts from the assets of all other counterparties
controls.control_description:
In addition, the
collecting party shall also provide the posting party with the option to segregate
the Initial Margin that it posts from the assets of all other counterparties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also provide the posting party with the option to segregate the initial margin that it posts from the assets of all other counterparties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be re-hypothecated, re-pledged or re-used or used as margin or guarantee for, or to secure any other transaction
controls.control_description:
(4) Initial Margin collected shall not be re-hypothecated, re-pledged or re-used or
used as margin or guarantee for, or to secure any other transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be re-hypothecated, re-pledged or re-used or used as margin or guarantee for, or to secure any other transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure the re-invested initial margin (after application of the relevant haircuts) meets the provisions set out in these directions
controls.control_description:
(5) Subject to the prior written consent of the posting party, Initial Margin collected in
cash may be reinvested in eligible collateral specified under Paragraph 10 of these
Directions provided that the re-invested Initial Margin (after application of the
relevant haircuts) meets the provisions set out in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the re-invested initial margin (after application of the relevant haircuts) meets the provisions set out in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure accrue to the counterparty who posted it
controls.control_description:
(6) Interest earned from the Initial Margin collected shall accrue to the counterparty
who posted it, subject to the agreement between the covered entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to accrue to the counterparty who posted it

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the interest accrued to the counterparty are paid to or held for the benefit of the counterparty, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
The
Covered Entity shall ensure that the interest accrued to the counterparty are paid
to or held for the benefit of the counterparty, as the case may be.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied to the value of the collateral received
controls.control_description: (5) Risk-sensitive haircuts shall be applied to the value of the collateral received.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied to the value of the collateral received

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied to all non-cash collateral received in a currency other than the base currency or eligible currencies as agreed in the credit support annex
controls.control_description:
(6) For the purpose of meeting Variation Margin requirements, an additional currency
mismatch haircut of eight per cent shall be applied to all non-cash collateral
received in a currency other than the base currency or eligible currencies as
agreed in the credit support annex.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied to all non-cash collateral received in a currency other than the base currency or eligible currencies as agreed in the credit support annex

controls.control_description:
(7) For the purpose of meeting Initial Margin requirements, an additional currency
mismatch haircut of eight per cent shall be applied to all cash and non-cash
collateral received in a currency other than the termination currency that the
counterparty which has posted the collateral has designated in the relevant
contract.

controls.control_description: Each counterparty may specify one termination currency.

controls.control_description:
(8) Securities issued by either of the counterparties to an NCCD transaction, or their
related parties, shall not be accepted as collateral.

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish appropriate controls to manage the risks associated with the collateral received including, inter-alia, wrong-way risk5, concentration risk
controls.control_description:
(9) Counterparties shall establish appropriate controls to manage the risks associated
with the collateral received including, inter-alia, wrong-way risk5, concentration
risk and liquidity risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish appropriate controls to manage the risks associated with the collateral received including, inter-alia, wrong-way risk5, concentration risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure the substituted collateral meets all the requirements set out in these directions and the value of the substituted collateral, after the application o
controls.control_description:
(10) Eligible collateral that was originally posted or collected may be substituted
provided that the substituted collateral meets all the requirements set out in these
Directions and the value of the substituted collateral, after the application of risk-
sensitive haircuts, is sufficient to meet the margin requirement
(11) A Domestic Covered Entity choosing to comply with margin requirements of a
foreign jurisdiction, in accordance with Paragraph 11 of these Directions, may
exchange margin using the collateral types, permitted in terms of the margin
requirements of the foreign jurisdiction.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to margin requirements in a foreign jurisdiction
controls.control_description:
Compliance with Margin Requirements of a Foreign Jurisdiction
(1) An NCCD transaction between a Domestic Covered Entity and a Foreign Covered
Entity may be subject to margin requirements in a foreign jurisdiction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to margin requirements in a foreign jurisdiction

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide to comply with these directions, or the margin requirements implemented by the foreign jurisdiction provided the margining framework in the for
controls.control_description:
A Domestic
Covered Entity and its counterparty in the foreign jurisdiction may decide to
comply with these Directions, or the margin requirements implemented by the
foreign jurisdiction provided the margining framework in the foreign jurisdiction is
assessed by the Domestic Covered Entity to be comparable to the requirements
in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to decide to comply with these directions, or the margin requirements implemented by the foreign jurisdiction provided the margining framework in the for

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide to exchange initial margin for nccd transactions between them in accordance with these directions or the margin requirements of a foreign juris
controls.control_description:
(2) Two Domestic Covered Entities that are authorised to deal in foreign exchange
under Section 10(1) of FEMA,1999 and at least one of which is a branch of foreign
bank operating in India may decide to exchange initial margin for NCCD
transactions between them in accordance with these Directions or the margin
requirements of a foreign jurisdiction provided the margining framework in the
foreign jurisdiction is assessed by both the Domestic Covered Entities to be
comparable to the requirements in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide to exchange initial margin for nccd transactions between them in accordance with these directions or the margin requirements of a foreign juris

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess the comparability of the margining framework of the foreign jurisdictions based on the following broad principles:

framework of the foreign jurisdictions based on the following broad principles:

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board-approved policy for the comparability assessment
controls.control_description:
(4) For this purpose, the Domestic Covered Entity shall put in place a Board-approved
policy for the comparability assessment.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board-approved policy for the comparability assessment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the risk management committee of the board/ equivalent body and subject to periodic review
controls.control_description:
The assessment of the margining
framework of each foreign jurisdiction shall be placed before the Risk
Management Committee of the Board/ equivalent body and subject to periodic
review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before the risk management committee of the board/ equivalent body and subject to periodic review

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a future date, undertake comparability assessment of margining framework of foreign jurisdictions vis-à-vis these directions
controls.control_description:
(5) The Reserve Bank may, at a future date, undertake comparability assessment of
margining framework of foreign jurisdictions vis-à-vis these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , at a future date, undertake comparability assessment of margining framework of foreign jurisdictions vis-à-vis these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to annex 18 (part b) of master circular on basel iii capital regulations dated may 12, 2023 in this regard
controls.control_description:
Such

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to annex 18 (part b) of master circular on basel iii capital regulations dated may 12, 2023 in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure impose additional conditions to be met by the counterparties intending to comply with the margining framework of that jurisdiction
controls.control_description:
(6) The Reserve Bank, based on its assessment of the margining framework of a
foreign jurisdiction, may impose additional conditions to be met by the
counterparties intending to comply with the margining framework of that
jurisdiction.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to impose additional conditions to be met by the counterparties intending to comply with the margining framework of that jurisdiction

controls.control_objective: To ensure exchange margin in an nccd transaction with a foreign covered entity if there is significant doubt regarding the enforceability of the close-out netting and collateral arrangements
controls.control_description:
(7) A Domestic Covered Entity may not exchange margin in an NCCD transaction
with a Foreign Covered Entity if there is significant doubt regarding the
enforceability of the close-out netting and collateral arrangements, subject to the
following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exchange margin in an nccd transaction with a foreign covered entity if there is significant doubt regarding the enforceability of the close-out netting and collateral arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake a legal review and document the basis for identifying a jurisdiction where close-out netting and/or collateral arrangements are not legally
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake a legal review and document the basis for identifying a jurisdiction where close-out netting and/or collateral arrangements are not legally

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place appropriate internal limits and controls to manage its exposure to counterparties located in the jurisdiction
controls.control_description:
(b) For each jurisdiction so assessed, the Domestic Covered Entity shall put in
place appropriate internal limits and controls to manage its exposure to
counterparties located in the jurisdiction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place appropriate internal limits and controls to manage its exposure to counterparties located in the jurisdiction

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that appropriate policies and procedures for dispute resolution are in place before undertaking an nccd transaction
controls.control_description:
Dispute resolution
(1) Counterparties shall ensure that appropriate policies and procedures for dispute
resolution are in place before undertaking an NCCD transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that appropriate policies and procedures for dispute resolution are in place before undertaking an nccd transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter-alia, include processes for determining discrepancies in material terms or valuations as disputes, mechanism for such disputes to be resolved
controls.control_description:
Such policies
and procedures shall, inter-alia, include processes for determining discrepancies
in material terms or valuations as disputes, mechanism for such disputes to be
resolved and escalation of material disputes to senior management, or to the
Board, as may be appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter-alia, include processes for determining discrepancies in material terms or valuations as disputes, mechanism for such disputes to be resolved

controls.control_objective: To ensure exchange the non-disputed amount first and make all necessary and appropriate efforts, including timely initiation of dispute resolution protocols, to
controls.control_description:
(2) In case of a margin dispute, counterparties shall exchange the non-disputed
amount first and make all necessary and appropriate efforts, including timely
initiation of dispute resolution protocols, to resolve the dispute and exchange the
remaining margin amount in a time-bound manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exchange the non-disputed amount first and make all necessary and appropriate efforts, including timely initiation of dispute resolution protocols, to

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish such additional information and clarification within the time frame specified
controls.control_description:
Obligation to provide information sought by the Reserve Bank
The Reserve Bank may call for any information or seek any clarification from any
agency involved in the NCCD markets, including but not limited to covered entities and
<image>
the collateral service provider, which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank is relevant
and the agency shall furnish such additional information and clarification within the
time frame specified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish such additional information and clarification within the time frame specified

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as given below: table 1: standardised initial margin schedule asset class initial margin requirement (% of notional exposure) foreign ex
controls.control_description:
Annex I
Standardised approach for calculating Initial Margin
(1) For each netting agreement, the net standardised Initial Margin amount shall be
calculated as given below:
Table 1: Standardised Initial Margin Schedule
Asset Class Initial Margin Requirement
(% of Notional Exposure)
Foreign Exchange 6
Interest Rate Residual maturity: 0 - 2 year 1
Residual maturity: 2 - 5 years 2
Residual maturity: > 5 years 4
Credit Residual maturity: 0 - 2 year 2
Residual maturity: 2 - 5 years 5
Residual maturity: > 5 years 10
Others 15
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated as given below: table 1: standardised initial margin schedule asset class initial margin requirement (% of notional exposure) foreign ex

Model approach for calculating Initial Margin
